events.reasoning: Game over. Proceed to end screen.
Starting WATCHER A0
Talk to Neow to see blessing options

events.translated: [ Lose all Gold Choose a rare Card to obtain ]
events.reasoning: Lose 99 gold to get a rare Watcher card. A rare card like Vault, Omniscience, or Blasphemy can define the run early. Gold is recoverable from fights.
Ragnarok deals 5x5 base, 5x10=50 in Wrath. At 3E its expensive but on a Calm exit turn (5E total), it fits the one-shot burst paradigm. Best option here.
Leave Neow, proceed to map

Starting x=6. Route plan: F1 Monster, F2 Unknown, F3 Unknown, F4 Shop(no gold yet but may have some by then), F5 Unknown, F6 Rest, F7 Elite(x=4 via rest at x=6->5 path), F8 Rest, F9 Treasure. Good rest coverage and 1 elite.

FIGHT STRATEGY - Jaw Worm. FIGHT TYPE: Hallway (full block). WIN CONDITION: Burst in Wrath with Ragnarok (5x10=50 in Wrath) or attacks. ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: Defend for block, stay in no-stance or Calm. KEY CARDS: Ragnarok (3E, 5x5 base, 5x10 in Wrath), Eruption (enter Wrath). POTION PLAN: Save potions. RISKS: Jaw Worm Turn 1 can attack for 11 or buff. Need to check intent. Turn 1: I have 3 Strikes, 2 Defends, 1 Miracle. No Eruption or Ragnarok in hand. I cannot burst this turn. Plan: Play 2 Defends (10 block) + 1 Strike (6 dmg) = 3E. Save Miracle for when I have Eruption+Ragnarok. If Jaw Worm attacks for 11, 10 block absorbs most. I take 1 damage. Alternatively: 2 Strikes + 1 Defend = 12 dmg + 5 block. Intent says DEBUG so I cannot see it. Let me be defensive - 2 Defends + 1 Strike.

events.label: Strategy
events.reasoning: FIGHT STRATEGY - Jaw Worm. FIGHT TYPE: Hallway (full block). WIN CONDITION: Burst in Wrath with Ragnarok (5x10=50 in Wrath) or attacks. ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: Defend for block, stay in no-stance or Calm. KEY CARDS: Ragnarok (3E, 5x5 base, 5x10 in Wrath), Eruption (enter Wrath). POTION PLAN: Save potions. Alternatively: 2 Strikes + 1 Defend = 12 dmg + 5 block. Intent says DEBUG so I cannot see it. Let me be defensive - 2 Defends + 1 Strike.

events.command: play Defend; play Defend; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Defend → Defend → Strike → Jaw Worm → End Turn
events.reasoning: Turn 1: No Eruption in hand so cannot burst. Playing 2 Defends (10 block) + 1 Strike (6 dmg). Saving Miracle for when I draw Eruption+Ragnarok for Wrath burst.

events.command: play Defend; play Defend; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Defend → Defend → Strike → Jaw Worm → End Turn
events.reasoning: Turn 2: Jaw Worm ATTACK_DEFEND 7. 10 block fully covers 7 incoming. Chip for 6. Cannot afford Eruption+Ragnarok in same turn (5E needed, only 4E with Miracle). Save burst for kill turn.

events.command: play Miracle; play Eruption 0; play Strike 0; play Strike 0
events.translated: Miracle → Eruption → Jaw Worm → Strike → Jaw Worm → Strike → Jaw Worm
events.reasoning: BURST KILL: Miracle(+1E=4E) -> Eruption(2E, Wrath, 18 dmg) -> Strike(1E, 12 dmg in Wrath) -> Strike(1E, 12 dmg in Wrath) = 42 total. Through 5 block = 37 net HP damage. Jaw Worm at 32 HP. 37>32 = confirmed kill.
0 energy, cannot play anything. In Wrath vs 14 incoming = 28 damage. Survivable at 71 HP. Lesson learned: Eruption damage resolves BEFORE entering Wrath, so the 9 damage is not doubled.
Jaw Worm at 4 HP + 5 block = 9 effective. Strike deals 6 (or 12 in Wrath). Either way, a Strike will kill or nearly kill. Playing Strike to finish the fight.
Take Block Potion for emergency defense.
Check card reward options.
Wallop is TOP tier for Watcher. 2E for 9 damage + block equal to unblocked damage. In Wrath: 18 damage + 18 block. Incredible for setup-burst turns and defensive value.
Proceed to map.
Only path available. Unknown at x=6. Route plan: F2 Unknown, F3 Unknown(x=5), F4 Shop(x=6) or Unknown(x=5), F5 Monster, F6 Rest, F7 Elite, F8 Rest, F9 Treasure. Good rest coverage around elite.
Wheel of Change is random but generally positive EV. Play it.
Spin the wheel.
Free relic from Wheel of Change! Great outcome.
Lizard Tail is amazing - revives at 50% HP on death. Perfect insurance for Wrath mistakes. Take it immediately.
Proceed to next floor.
Leave event.
Unknown(x=5) leads to F4 with options for Shop(x=6) or Unknown(x=5). Path toward Rest(F6) then Elite(F7) then Rest(F8).

events.command: play Miracle; play Ragnarok 0; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Miracle → Ragnarok → Cultist → Strike → Cultist → End Turn
events.reasoning: Cultist Turn 1 is buff (Incantation), no attack incoming. Max damage: Miracle(+1E=4E) + Ragnarok(3E, 25 dmg) + Strike(1E, 6 dmg) = 31 damage. Cultist to 19 HP. Kill next turn in Wrath.

events.command: play Strike 0; play Strike 0; play Defend; end
events.translated: Strike → Cultist → Strike → Cultist → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Turn 2: No Eruption in hand, cannot burst. 2 Strikes (12 dmg, Cultist to 7 HP) + Defend (5 block vs 6 incoming = take 1). Finish next turn.
Kill Cultist: 2 Strikes = 12 damage > 7 HP. Confirmed kill.
Entropic Brew fills all potion slots with random potions. Excellent value.
Check card reward options.

Talk to the Hand is HIGH tier. 1E for 7 damage + Block Return on target. Exhausts so wont clog deck. Excellent for Hexaghost boss (constant attacks) - gives free block every time the target attacks. Great value in any long fight.
Proceed to map.
Monster(x=4) for more combat experience, gold, and card rewards. Leads to F5 Monster then F6 Rest before F7 Elite. Need fights to build deck.

Ragnarok hits all enemies 5 times for 5 damage each = 25 per enemy. Louse 0 has 11 HP + 3 Curl Up = 14 effective, Louse 1 has 11 HP + 5 Curl Up = 16 effective. 25 > 16. Both die instantly. Clean one-card kill.
Miracle gives +1E. Strike deals 6 vs 3 block = 3 net damage > 1 HP. Kill confirmed.
Power Potion gives random Power card when used. Could get Mental Fortress, Rushdown, or Battle Hymn - all top tier.
Check card reward options.

Mental Fortress is THE #1 priority Power for Watcher. 4 block per stance change (6 upgraded). Converts the stance dance engine into a passive block engine. Every Calm/Wrath cycle generates free block. This is the card that makes the whole engine work.
Proceed to map.
Only path. Monster fight for more gold and cards. Next floor leads to Rest(x=4) before Elite(x=4) at F7.

events.command: play Defend; play Defend; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Defend → Defend → Strike → Looter → End Turn
events.reasoning: Turn 1: Looter attacks for 10. 2 Defends = 10 block fully covers incoming. Strike chips for 6 damage. Looter to 38 HP. No Wrath entry without safe exit available.

events.command: play Miracle; play Wallop 0; play Strike 0; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Miracle → Wallop → Looter → Strike → Looter → Strike → Looter → End Turn
events.reasoning: Turn 2: Miracle(+1E=4E) + Wallop(2E, 9 dmg+9 block) + Strike(1E, 6 dmg) + Strike(1E, 6 dmg) = 21 damage total. 9 block vs 10 incoming = take 1. Looter to 17 HP. Should kill next turn.
Ragnarok 5x5=25 damage to Looter (only target). 25 > 17 HP = confirmed kill. Cant afford Mental Fortress too (3E Ragnarok = all energy). Kill Looter to stop gold theft.
Check card reward.
Cut Through Fate is TOP tier draw. 1E for 7 damage + Scry 2 + draw 1. Improves hand quality and deck cycling. Exactly what Watcher needs for finding burst pieces.
Proceed to map. Next stop: Rest site before elite.
Rest site at x=4. At 76% HP with Lizard Tail insurance. Will upgrade Eruption (2E->1E, highest priority Watcher upgrade). Then path to Elite at F7.
Upgrade Eruption from 2E to 1E. This is THE highest priority Watcher upgrade. Makes the Calm->Wrath loop energy-positive. At 76% HP with Lizard Tail, upgrading is better than resting.
Upgrade Eruption from 2E to 1E. The single most impactful Watcher upgrade. Makes the Calm energy loop net positive.
Confirm Eruption upgrade.
Eruption upgraded. Proceed to map. Heading to Elite at F7.

Elite at F7 for relic. At 76% HP with Lizard Tail insurance, 3 potions (Block, Entropic Brew, Power). Well-prepared. Rest(x=5) available at F8 for recovery. Eruption+ now costs 1E making burst much easier.

FIGHT STRATEGY - Sentries (3x). FIGHT TYPE: Hard-scaler (Dazed floods deck). WIN CONDITION: Kill them fast before Dazed cards overwhelm draws. Ragnarok hits random targets 5x5. In Wrath: 5x10=50 random distributed. Sentries have ~40 HP each = 120 total. ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: Hard to block 3 enemies. Mental Fortress + stance cycling can generate block. POTIONS: Use Power Potion for elite fight. Entropic Brew if needed. KEY CARDS: Mental Fortress (play ASAP for block on stance changes), Ragnarok (main AOE damage), Eruption+ (1E Wrath entry). RISKS: Dazed flooding if fight goes long. PLAN: Turn 1 - play Mental Fortress, then damage. Use Power Potion for a free extra power. Focus damage on one Sentry to reduce incoming. Sentries pattern: two attack, one uses Dazed. The middle one (intent 9) is attacking.

events.label: Strategy

Use Power Potion on elite fight. Could get Rushdown, Battle Hymn, or another great power for the fight.
Check Power Potion card choices
Select first power option from Power Potion

events.command: play Rushdown; play Mental Fortress; play Miracle; play Wallop 1; play Defend; end
events.translated: Rushdown → Mental Fortress → Miracle → Wallop → Sentry → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Setup turn: Rushdown(0E, draw 2 on Wrath entry) + Mental Fortress(1E, 4 block per stance change) = full engine online. Miracle(+1E=3E) + Wallop(2E, 9 dmg + 9 block on attacker Sentry 1) + Defend(1E, 5 block). Total 14 block vs 9 incoming = zero damage. 9 dmg to Sentry 1.
Block Potion for 12 block. With 2 Defends (10 more) = 22 block vs 18 incoming. Zero damage. Still have 1E for Talk to the Hand.

events.command: play Talk to the Hand 0; play Defend; play Defend; end
events.translated: Talk to the Hand → Sentry → Defend → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Turn 2: 18 incoming (2 Sentries x 9). Block Potion(12) + Defend(5) + Defend(5) = 22 block vs 18 = zero damage. Talk to Hand on Sentry 0 deals 7 dmg + Block Return for future block. Conserve HP, dont enter Wrath against double damage.

events.command: play Defend; play Strike 1; play Strike 1; end
events.translated: Defend → Strike → Sentry → Strike → Sentry → End Turn
events.reasoning: Turn 3: Sentry 1 attacks 9. Defend(5 block) + 2 Strikes on Sentry 1 (12 dmg, to 18 HP). Take 4 damage. Focus fire on weakest Sentry to reduce enemy count fastest.
Turn 4: 18 incoming. Wallop(9 dmg+9 block on Sentry 0) + Defend(5 block) = 14 block vs 18 = take 4. Sentry 0 to 28 HP. Best I can do with Dazed-clogged hand.

Turn 5: Vigilance(2E, 8 block + enter Calm = MF 4 block = 12 total) + Strike(1E, 6 dmg on Sentry 1, to 12 HP) vs 9 incoming = zero damage. In Calm for next turn: +2E on exit + Rushdown draws + MF block. Engine is about to come online.
Eruption+ from Calm: exit Calm (+2E, total 4E), enter Wrath (Rushdown draws 2, MF gives 4 block), deal 9 dmg to Sentry 1 (to 3 HP). Need to see Rushdown draws before planning rest of turn.

events.translated: Strike → Sentry → Ragnarok → Sentry → End Turn
events.reasoning: In Wrath with no exit. 36 incoming from 2 attackers. Kill Sentry 1 (Strike, 12 Wrath dmg > 3 HP) to stop Dazed. Ragnarok in Wrath = 5x10=50 randomly split between Sentries 0 and 2. May kill Sentry 0 (28 HP). Minimizes future incoming damage. Accept the Wrath hit this turn.
Both Sentries debuffing = zero incoming. Strike kills Sentry 2 (1 HP). Only Sentry 0 (18 HP) remains. Save energy, finish next turn.
Entropic Brew fills all slots with random potions. At 15 HP in Wrath vs 18 incoming, need help urgently. Any damage/block potion could save me.
Weak Potion on Sentry 0 to strip Artifact 1. Then Fear Potion can apply Vulnerable for 50% more damage next turn.
Fear Potion applies Vulnerable. Sentry already Weakened. Vulnerable = 50% more damage taken. Will help kill it next turn.
Turn 8: Only playable card is Defend (5 block). 13 incoming = take 8. HP 15->7. Survivable. Next turn kill the Sentry with Wrath attacks + Vulnerable.
Kill Sentry. Strike in Wrath = 12, with Vulnerable = 18 damage. Sentry at 18 HP. Exact kill confirmed. No attack this turn so safe even if miscalculated.
Orichalcum: gain 6 block if ending turn with 0 block. Great passive defense, especially when hand is clogged or going all-in on attacks.
Check card reward.
None of these cards fit the deck well. Study is expensive, Sands of Time costs 4E, Crush Joints is mediocre. Deck already has 15 cards - keep it lean.
Proceed to map. Need rest site urgently at 7 HP.
Rest at x=5. At 7/72 HP (9%), MUST rest. Any fight would be lethal.
Rest to heal. 7/72 -> ~28/72. Survival is priority.
Proceed to map.
Treasure room - free relic with no combat. Perfect for our low HP state.
Collect 73 gold.
Ink Bottle: draw 1 every 10 cards played. Modest card draw support. Take it over Sapphire Key since we need the relic and dont need to beat Act 4.
Proceed to map.

Monster(x=5) path. At 38% HP with Lizard Tail insurance. Need to fight through to F15 rest before boss. Engine (Mental Fortress + Rushdown + Eruption+) should enable zero-damage turns when sequenced correctly.
Ragnarok 5x5=25 random across 5 slimes. Will kill some or weaken all. See results before finishing.
Miracle for +1E to play CutThroughFate
CutThroughFate on Acid Slime (8 HP, deals 7 = to 1 HP). Draws 1 card. Scry 2 for deck quality.
Confirm scry choices - keep default.
0 energy. End turn. Orichalcum gives 6 block. 13 incoming - 6 = take 7. HP 28->21.

events.translated: Strike → Acid Slime (S) → Wallop → Spike Slime (S) → End Turn
events.reasoning: Kill Acid Slime(Strike, 6>1 HP). Kill Spike Slime 2(Wallop, 9=9 HP, gives 9 block). Only Spike Slime 4 remains(5 dmg). 9 block>5. Zero damage.

events.command: play Mental Fortress; play Strike 4; play Defend; end
events.translated: Mental Fortress → Strike → Spike Slime (S) → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Turn 3: Mental Fortress(1E, engine power setup) + Strike(1E, 6 dmg, slime to 5) + Defend(1E, 5 block vs 5 incoming = zero). Kill next turn.
Strike kills Spike Slime (6 > 5 HP). Fight over.
Check card reward.
Fear No Evil is a Wrath exit that also deals damage. 1E, 7 dmg, enter Calm when enemy attacks. Gives us another safe way to exit Wrath. Critical for the stance dance engine.
Proceed to map.
Unknown(x=5) for chance at event (non-combat). At 29% HP, any non-combat room helps. Monster is guaranteed combat.
At 21 HP, losing 11 HP puts me at 10 HP which is dangerously close to death. Losing 42 gold (175->133) is much safer. Gold is recoverable from fights.
Leave event.
Only path available. Must fight. Engine is online (Mental Fortress + Rushdown). Play carefully for zero damage.
Miracle for +1E = 4E total
Eruption+ on weakest Louse. 9 dmg triggers Curl Up 5 = 4 net HP damage. Enters Wrath for Ragnarok burst.
Ragnarok in Wrath: 5x10=50 random across 3 Louse. Total effective HP ~46. Should kill all or most. If any survive, take doubled attack but at most 10 damage.
Check card reward.
Deck is 16 cards, keep it lean. Already have Vigilance + Fear No Evil for Calm entry. None of these are must-takes.
Proceed to map.
Only path. Monster at x=6 -> F14 Monster -> F15 Rest before boss. Two fights then rest.

events.command: play Defend; play Strike 1; play Strike 1; end
events.translated: Defend → Strike → Acid Slime (M) → Strike → Acid Slime (M) → End Turn
events.reasoning: Turn 1: Acid Slime attacks 7. Defend(5 block) + 2 Strikes on Acid Slime(12 dmg, to 18 HP). Take 2. Save Miracle+Eruption for Wrath burst next turn.

events.command: play Miracle; play Mental Fortress; play Vigilance; play Defend; end
events.translated: Miracle → Mental Fortress → Vigilance → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Turn 2: 16 incoming. Miracle(+1E=4E) + MF(1E, setup) + Vigilance(2E, 8 block + 4 MF = 12 block, enter Calm) + Defend(1E, 5 block) = 17 block vs 16. Zero damage. In Calm for +2E next turn. Engine online.
Both enemies buffing/debuffing = zero incoming. Ragnarok 25 random damage across 2 enemies. Free damage turn.
0 energy. Both enemies near death (8 HP each). Free turn - no attacks. Orichalcum gives 6 passive block. End turn, kill both next turn.

events.command: play Talk to the Hand 0; play Strike 0; play Defend; end
events.translated: Talk to the Hand → Fungi Beast → Strike → Fungi Beast → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Turn 4: Kill Fungi Beast first (12 dmg threat + Str 6 scaling). TtH(5 Weakened) + Strike(4 Weakened) = 9 > 8 HP. Kill. Defend(5 block) vs 10 Acid Slime = take 5. HP 19->14. Spore Cloud gives 2 Vulnerable but tolerable.
Kill Fungi Beast (1 HP). Eruption+ deals 9 > 1. Triggers Calm exit (+2E), Wrath entry (Rushdown draw 2, MF 4 block). Then can damage Acid Slime.
Strike in Wrath = 12 damage > 8 HP. Kill Acid Slime. Fight over.
Liquid Memories returns a card from discard to hand. Useful for finding key cards.
Check card reward.
No useful cards. Deck is already 16 cards. Keep it lean for boss.
Proceed. At 4 HP, need rest site desperately. F14 Monster then F15 Rest.

Monster(x=5). At 4 HP, must survive this fight. Lizard Tail revives once if I die. Engine should enable zero-damage turns if I play perfectly. Need to find Eruption+ and stance cycle with MF for passive block.

FIGHT STRATEGY - Slaver (single). FIGHT TYPE: Hallway, ZERO DAMAGE REQUIRED at 4 HP. WIN CONDITION: Kill within 2-3 turns with Wrath burst. ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: Block fully every turn. MF + stance cycling for passive block. Turn 1: No Eruption in hand. Play 2 Defends (10 block) + Strike (6 dmg) if attack is <=10. Or play defensive only if attack is higher. Intent is DEBUG so unknown. KEY CARDS: MF not in hand, Eruption+ not in hand. Need to draw them. POTION PLAN: Cultist Potion for emergency (gives Ritual = Str gain). Liquid Memories to recall key cards. RISKS: If I take ANY damage I die. Must block perfectly.

Liquid Memories to recall key cards. RISKS: If I take ANY damage I die. Must block perfectly.

events.command: play Talk to the Hand 0; play Defend; play Defend; end
events.translated: Talk to the Hand → Slaver → Defend → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Turn 1 at 4 HP: Must block fully. TtH(7 dmg + Block Return for future) + 2 Defends(10 block). If Slaver attacks <=10, zero damage. Block Return will help in future turns.

events.command: play Miracle; play Mental Fortress; play Fear No Evil 0; play Defend; end
events.translated: Miracle → Mental Fortress → Fear No Evil → Slaver → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Turn 2 at 1 HP! MUST block 8 perfectly. Miracle(+1E=4E) + MF(1E, setup) + Fear No Evil(1E, 7 dmg, enters Calm since enemy attacks = MF 4 block) + Defend(1E, 5 block) = 4+5 = 9 block > 8. Zero damage. Slaver to 35.

events.command: play Fear No Evil 0; play Defend; end
events.translated: Fear No Evil → Slaver → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: At 1 HP: Fear No Evil(1E, 7 dmg, enter Calm = MF 4 block) + Defend(1E, 5 block) = 9 block > 8 incoming. Zero damage. In Calm for burst next turn with Eruption+.
Free turn, max damage. Strike deals 6.
Wallop(2E, 9 dmg + 9 block on Slaver). Free turn so block doesnt matter but extra block is fine. Slaver to 19 HP. 2 block from Block Return per attack.
Entangled - cannot play any attacks. All hand is attacks. 8 incoming at 1 HP. Orichalcum gives 6, take 2. Die. Lizard Tail should revive at 36 HP.
Eruption+ from Calm: exit Calm(+2E=4E), enter Wrath(Rushdown draw 2, MF 8 block). 9 dmg to Slaver(to 10). Then Wallop in Wrath(18 dmg) kills it.
Wallop in Wrath: 9*2=18 damage. Slaver at 10 HP. 18>10. Confirmed kill!
Check card reward.
Deck is 16 cards. Already have Eruption+ for Wrath entry. Crescendo is decent but exhausts and costs 1E without dealing damage. Keep deck lean for boss.
Proceed to rest site at F15 before boss.
Pre-boss rest. Will heal before Hexaghost fight.
Rest before Hexaghost. Heal from 36 to ~57 HP. Need HP for the boss fight.
Proceed to Hexaghost boss fight.
Head to Hexaghost boss.

FIGHT STRATEGY - Hexaghost (250 HP, Act 1 Boss). FIGHT TYPE: Boss - spend HP freely for faster kill. WIN CONDITION: Stance cycle engine. MF + Rushdown + Eruption+ for burst turns. Ragnarok in Wrath = 50 damage. Wallop in Wrath = 18 damage + 18 block. ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: Not required (boss fight), but minimize with MF passive block. KEY CARDS: Mental Fortress (passive block on stance changes), Eruption+ (1E Wrath entry from Calm = 5E turn), Ragnarok (3E, 50 in Wrath), Wallop (2E, 18 dmg + 18 block in Wrath). POTION PLAN: Cultist Potion for Ritual (Str scaling). Liquid Memories to recall key cards. Use both when needed for burst. RISKS: Hexaghost Turn 1 does small attack, then charges for Inferno (~60 damage on specific turns). Need to block Inferno turns or be in Calm. Turn 1 plan: Set up Mental Fortress if possible. Hexaghost Turn 1 typically does small attack (2x damage of first card played in Act). Play defensively, set up MF, enter Calm.

events.label: Strategy
events.reasoning: FIGHT STRATEGY - Hexaghost (250 HP, Act 1 Boss). FIGHT TYPE: Boss - spend HP freely for faster kill. WIN CONDITION: Stance cycle engine. MF + Rushdown + Eruption+ for burst turns. Ragnarok in Wrath = 50 damage. Wallop in Wrath = 18 damage + 18 block. ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: Not required (boss fight), but minimize with MF passive block. Hexaghost Turn 1 typically does small attack (2x damage of first card played in Act). Play defensively, set up MF, enter Calm.
Cultist Potion gives Ritual 1 = gain 1 Str at end of each turn. Str scales all attacks for the entire boss fight. Best time to use it is Turn 1.
Miracle for +1E = 4E. Then Eruption+ for Wrath entry + Rushdown draws.
Eruption+ for 9 damage to Hexaghost. Enter Wrath, Rushdown draws 2. See what we draw.

events.command: play Fear No Evil 0; play Defend; play Defend; end
events.translated: Fear No Evil → Hexaghost → Defend → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Exit Wrath via Fear No Evil(1E, 7 dmg, enter Calm). Then 2 Defends(10 block). Total 10 block in Calm (not doubled incoming). Hexaghost Turn 1 is typically small attack. Safe exit from Wrath.
Play Defend for 10 total block. End turn. Hexaghost Turn 1 typically small attack. Should be survivable.

events.command: play Mental Fortress; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Mental Fortress → Strike → Hexaghost → End Turn
events.reasoning: Turn 2: INFERNO 60 incoming! MF(1E, critical setup for rest of fight) + Strike(1E, 7 dmg with Str 1). Dont play Defend - Orichalcum gives 6 block if 0 block at end. 6 block vs 60 = take 54. HP 57-54 = 3. Barely survive. MF online for future turns.

events.command: play Talk to the Hand 0; play Wallop 0; end
events.translated: Talk to the Hand → Hexaghost → Wallop → Hexaghost → End Turn
events.reasoning: Turn 3: 12 incoming at 3 HP. TtH(1E, 9 dmg, Block Return for ongoing block) + Wallop(2E, 11 dmg + 11 block). 11 block vs 12 = take 1. HP 3->2. Hexaghost to 191.
Cut Through Fate(1E, 10 dmg) + Scry 2 + draw 1. Draw pile has Defends, Eruption+, Vigilance. Need extra block card to survive 20 incoming at 3 HP.
Confirm scry.
From Calm: Eruption+(1E, exit Calm +2E=3E, enter Wrath, MF 8 block, 12 dmg). Then Fear No Evil to exit Wrath. Building block through stance cycling + MF.
Liquid Memories returns a card from discard to hand. Discard has Cut Through Fate and Eruption+. CtF could help scry+draw+damage but I need block. Hmm, neither is a block card. Still worth trying.
Take Cut Through Fate from discard. Wont have energy but at least it exists in hand.
CtF costs 0E from Liquid Memories! 10 dmg + scry 2 + draw 1. Free damage and a draw to potentially find more block.
Confirm scry

events.translated: Fear No Evil → Hexaghost → End Turn
events.reasoning: Fear No Evil(1E, 20 dmg in Wrath, enter Calm, MF 4 block + Block Return 2 on hit) = 12 block vs 20 incoming. Take 8. HP 3-8 = dead unless Block Return gives more. Its the best play available. Hoping BR reduces enough.

events.command: play Defend; play Defend; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Defend → Defend → Strike → Hexaghost → End Turn

Slavers Collar: +1 energy in elite and boss fights. Extra energy is incredibly valuable for Watcher burst turns. With 4E from Calm exit + 1 bonus = 5E boss turns. Enables Eruption+ + Ragnarok (4E) + more.

FIGHT STRATEGY - The Chosen (96 HP). FIGHT TYPE: Hallway but kill-speed priority. Chosen applies Hex which adds Dazed per Skill played. Must MINIMIZE SKILL PLAYS once Hex active. WIN CONDITION: Kill fast with attacks. Avoid Skill-heavy stance cycling. Use Attacks for Wrath entry (Eruption) and exit (Fear No Evil). ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: Accept some damage to kill faster. POTION PLAN: Save for later. KEY CARDS: Eruption+ (Attack), Fear No Evil (Attack), Ragnarok (Attack). Avoid: Vigilance (Skill), Defend (Skill). Turn 1: Chosen probably Hexes. Max damage with Miracle + 4 Strikes = 24 damage.
